channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Supreme Court Dismisses North Cotabato Clerk for Falsified Civil Service Examination Record
item.description: The Supreme Court has dismissed a clerk of court assigned at the Regional Trial Court Branch 22 in Kabacan, North Cotabato after finding her guilty of serious dishonesty for allegedly falsifying her c...

item.title: Security problems, late diagnosis and funding shortages dey worsen Ebola outbreak for DR Congo
item.description: The latest Ebola outbreak for the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) don quickly become serious public health problem. On 17 May 2026, the World Health Organization declare am as Public Health Emergen...

item.title: Orbit relegated after debut PSL season as Pirates secure title and Chiefs end campaign with defeat
item.description: The final day of the Betway Premiership delivered a dramatic conclusion to the season, with relegation battles, title celebrations and top-eight qualification all decided simultaneously. Orbit College...

item.title: WHO World Health Assembly declares stroke a global public health priority, urging stronger prevention and care systems
item.description: The World Health Assembly (WHA) has, for the first time, adopted a resolution recognising stroke as a major public health priority, calling on countries to strengthen action across the entire care pat...

item.title: Ontario government becomes involved in discussions over the future of Brantford Municipal Airport
item.description: The article reports that the Ontario provincial government has become involved in the ongoing debate surrounding the future of the Brantford Municipal Airport. The issue has attracted attention from l...

item.title: LSK Demands Public Inquest Following Death of Kiambu Student in Police Custody
item.description: The Law Society of Kenya (LSK) has vowed to pursue justice after the death of 24-year-old Brian Njung’e, a student at Kiambu National Polytechnic, who reportedly died while being held at Kiambu Police...

item.title: Mwinyi directs Zanzibar public institutions to become self-sustaining and generate revenue
item.description: Zanzibar President Dr Hussein Ali Mwinyi amesema umefika wakati kwa taasisi za umma kuachana na utegemezi wa mishahara na ruzuku kutoka Serikali Kuu na badala yake kujitegemea kifedha kupitia uzalisha...

item.title: Police detail alleged nationwide cocaine network linked to Anmol alias Pinky
item.description: Karachi police have shared extensive details about Anmol alias Pinky, a 31-year-old woman accused of operating a large cocaine trafficking network across Karachi, Lahore and other cities. According to...

item.title: DWP to deploy covert surveillance vehicles in expanded crackdown on benefit fraud
item.description: The UK Department for Work and Pensions (DWP) is preparing to introduce covert surveillance vehicles equipped with hidden cameras as part of a wider effort to tackle benefit fraud. According to a gove...

item.title: City Boy Movement Commends Onyesoh After Winning APC Senatorial Primary in Rivers East
item.description: The City Boy Movement in Etche Local Government Area of Rivers State has congratulated Senator Allwell Onyesoh following his victory in the All Progressives Congress (APC) primary election for the Riv...

item.title: How South Africa’s cheapest cars depreciate after one year on the road
item.description: A new analysis of South Africa’s entry-level car market shows that the financial gap between buying a brand-new vehicle and a nearly new one after one year is inconsistent, but often significant enoug...

item.title: Defense Secretary Hegseth warns West Point graduates they may be deployed to war amid rising geopolitical tensions
item.description: U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth delivered a commencement address at the U.S. Military Academy at West Point, where he told graduating cadets that their next assignment could potentially involve...

item.title: Uganda reports three additional Ebola cases as outbreak reaches five infections
item.description: Uganda’s Ministry of Health has confirmed three new Ebola cases, raising the total number of infections in the ongoing outbreak to five. The announcement was made on Saturday as health authorities int...

item.title: Rare Rehearsal Photos Highlight Rowan Atkinson’s Early Comedy Work on “Not the Nine O’Clock News”
item.description: The article looks back at Rowan Atkinson’s early television career through a collection of behind-the-scenes rehearsal photographs from the British sketch comedy series “Not the Nine O’Clock News,” wh...

item.title: George Russell claims Canadian Grand Prix sprint victory after tense battle with teammate Kimi Antonelli
item.description: George Russell secured victory in the Canadian Grand Prix sprint race at Montreal’s Circuit Gilles Villeneuve after starting from pole position for Mercedes. The British driver controlled the race ove...

item.title: Neil Young performs first live show of 2026 at Vancouver benefit concert featuring ‘Heart Of Gold’ and ‘After The Gold Rush’
item.description: Neil Young made an unexpected return to the stage for his first live performance of 2026, appearing at a benefit concert in Vancouver dedicated to Canadian environmentalist David Suzuki’s 90th birthda...

item.title: Ro Khanna Criticizes Trump After AI-Generated Social Media Attack
item.description: Representative Ro Khanna, a Democrat from California, publicly responded to a social media attack launched by President Donald Trump on Saturday. Trump used his Truth Social platform to post an insult...

item.title: Kenya Met issues 24-hour weather outlook warning of rainfall, thunderstorms and strong winds across multiple counties
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department has released a 24-hour weather outlook covering conditions from Saturday night through Sunday, May 24, warning of varied weather patterns across different regions o...

item.title: Ebola treatment facility attacked in eastern Congo, allowing 18 suspected cases to escape
item.description: An Ebola treatment tent in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo was set on fire again, according to an Associated Press report updated on May 23, 2026. The incident led to the escape of 18 individ...

item.title: Finding Emily review: Romantic comedy explores obsession and manipulation on a university campus
item.description: Film critic Ron Cerabona reviews Finding Emily, a romantic comedy directed by Alicia MacDonald and written by Rachel Hirons, arguing that the movie struggles to balance romance with behaviour that bor...
